INSERT INTO test_lengthUTF8 VALUES ('こんにちは世界');
CREATE TABLE nested_test (id UInt64, utf8_string String);
INSERT INTO nested_test VALUES (1, 'Test string'), (2, 'Тест стринг'), (3, 'テストの文字列');
CREATE TABLE multi_table_test (id UInt64, another_string String);
INSERT INTO multi_table_test VALUES (1, 'Other test'), (2, 'Другой тест');
SELECT a.id, lengthUTF8(a.utf8_string) AS length_a, lengthUTF8(b.another_string) AS length_b FROM nested_test AS a JOIN multi_table_test AS b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT lengthUTF8('a') AS single_char_length, lengthUTF8('あ') AS kanji_length;
